hero.title: FARREL AD
hero.subtitle: BACKEND SYSTEMS & DATA ENGINEERING / AI
hero.tagline: I design high-performance REST APIs, build robust data processing pipelines, and deploy machine learning models to production.

backend.title: Backend Engineering
backend.desc: Designing resilient microservice architectures, optimizing relational database schemas, and building high-performance REST/GraphQL APIs.

data.title: Data Engineering
data.desc: Structuring high-throughput ETL workflows, managing data lakes, and parsing large-scale datasets with high reliability.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.desc: Deploying machine learning models in production, tuning local inference engines, and designing semantic vector pipelines.

list.title: LuminaDB API Gateway
list.desc: A high-performance reverse proxy and API gateway optimized for real-time WebSockets and gRPC stream handling.

list.title: Chronos Data Ingestion Pipeline
list.desc: High-throughput distributed ETL pipeline for ingesting IoT telemetry data using Kafka and TimescaleDB.

list.title: Aura Therapy API
list.desc: The award-winning RESTful API and websocket backend for mobile-based child autism therapy.

list.title: Nidus Inference Engine
list.desc: A containerized PyTorch inference endpoint with dynamic batching, Redis caching, and automated request queuing.

list.title: Vortex ETL Processor
list.desc: Parallel processing engine designed for transform operations on large-scale parquet datasets.

list.title: Apex Feature Store
list.desc: A centralized, low-latency key-value store for machine learning features, providing real-time data inputs.

list.title: Sentry Log Pipeline
list.desc: Real-time log aggregation and analytics pipeline built to collect, parse, and store distributed system events.

list.title: NeuralForge API
list.desc: RESTful service providing automatic text summarization and semantic embeddings using local Transformer models.

list.title: Kratos Task Orchestrator
list.desc: Lightweight DAG-based job scheduler for automating data pipeline executions with automated retry logic.

list.title: VectorStream Indexer
list.desc: Database indexing pipeline designed to vectorize document databases and sync them into Milvus.

contact.sub: Feel free to reach out for project discussions, system design review, or data pipeline collaborations.
